title: build-artifact block metadata
description: Artifact emitted by the build-artifact (docker-build) building block after a successful image build.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the block completed.

commit.description: Full git SHA of the commit that was built.

image.description: Image name without registry prefix (e.g. owner/repo).

image_ref.description: Fully-qualified image reference pinned by digest (registry/name@sha256:...).

tags.description: All tags applied to the built image.

version.description: OCI version label applied to the image.

build_type.description: ephemeral = SHA-tagged branch/PR build; release = semver-tagged release build.
